meta.name: Label Material Database
meta.description: Database of label material stocks across major manufacturers. All records verified against manufacturer product pages / technical data sheets. English primary; *_zh fields are Chinese translations.
meta.notes: Schema bootstrapped 2026-07-03 from crawl task field mapping; the referenced 67-record seed file was not present in the repository.

LINTEC.record_granularity: product-series level where no individual codes published

Avery Dennison.record_granularity: one record per Fasson spec (face + adhesive combo)

records.name_en: HP-350N HEATPROOF Heat Resistant Label
records.name_zh: HP-350N HEATPROOF 耐高温标签
records.adhesive_en: Pressure-sensitive adhesive (category-level statement on Labels for Heat Treatment page)
records.adhesive_zh: 压敏胶（“热处理用标签”品类页的整体说明）
records.application_en: Dual-use label: direct hot application on hot steel and aluminum surfaces up to 400℃ (apply-to-hot), and heat treatment process management applied from room temperature then heated (apply-cold-then-heat) through annealing, homogenizing and reflow processes. Case studies: aluminum billet homogenizing (applied at room temperature, then 550℃ x 12 hours) and injection casting mold management (200〜400℃, multiple cycles). Industries: steel, aluminum, ceramic, automotive, electronics, casting/jig management.
records.application_zh: 两用标签：可直接贴附于最高400℃的高温钢材和铝材表面（热贴），也可在室温贴附后经受加热（冷贴后加热），用于退火、均质化、回流焊等热处理工序的过程管理。应用案例：铝坯均质化工艺（室温贴附后550℃ x 12小时）、注射铸造模具管理（200〜400℃，多次循环）。行业：钢铁、铝业、陶瓷、汽车、电子、铸造/治具管理。
features_en: Application temperature up to 400℃ (can be applied to hot surfaces)
Application temperature from room temp to 400℃
Excellent ink stability and resistance to ink smudging when applying at high temperatures
features_zh: 贴附温度最高可达400℃（可直接贴附于高温表面）
贴附温度范围：室温至400℃
最高耐热温度600℃
高温贴附时油墨稳定性优异，抗油墨晕染
benefits_en: Identify and barcode products at high temperatures, or track products through high temperature processes
Variable information and barcodes can be printed on demand with standard thermal transfer printers
benefits_zh: 可在高温下对产品进行标识和条码化，或在高温工序中跟踪产品
可用标准热转印打印机按需打印可变信息和条码
records.temperature_performance: Application temperature up to 400℃ (from room temp to 400℃); maximum heat resistance to 600℃

records.name_en: HP-600 HEATPROOF Label for Direct Hot Application
records.name_zh: HP-600 HEATPROOF 高温直贴标签
records.application_en: Direct hot application (apply-to-hot) on hot steel and aluminum products immediately after casting/rolling, at surface temperatures from 250℃ to 600℃. Installation examples: steel hot coil at 550℃ and aluminum sow at 500℃, applied manually or with robotic labeler systems. Industries: steel, aluminum.
records.application_zh: 高温直贴（热贴）标签，可在铸造/轧制后立即贴附于表面温度250℃至600℃的高温钢材和铝材产品。安装示例：550℃的热轧钢卷、500℃的铝锭（sow），可人工或用机器人贴标系统贴附。行业：钢铁、铝业。
features_en: Heat activated adhesive (activated by hot direct application)
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：250℃至600℃
最高耐热温度600℃
热活化型胶粘剂（通过高温直贴激活）
benefits_en: Identify and barcode hot coils soon after rolling; products can be accurately identified and verified downstream using barcode scanners
Labels printed on demand or pre-printed using standard thermal transfer printers
benefits_zh: 轧制后即可对热轧卷进行标识和条码化；下游工序可用条码扫描器准确识别和核验产品
可用标准热转印打印机按需打印或预印标签
records.temperature_performance: Application temperature from 250℃ to 600℃; maximum heat resistance to 600℃

records.name_en: HP-700T HEATPROOF Label for Direct Hot Application
records.name_zh: HP-700T HEATPROOF 高温直贴标签
records.application_en: Direct hot application (apply-to-hot) on hot steel products immediately after casting, at surface temperatures from 450℃ to 800℃. Installation examples: steel slab at 800℃, steel billet at 750℃, steel bloom at 800℃, applied with robotic labeler systems. Industries: steel, aluminum.
records.application_zh: 高温直贴（热贴）标签，可在铸造后立即贴附于表面温度450℃至800℃的高温钢材产品。安装示例：800℃钢板坯（slab）、750℃钢坯（billet）、800℃大方坯（bloom），可用机器人贴标系统贴附。行业：钢铁、铝业。
features_en: Heat activated adhesive (activated by hot direct application)
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：450℃至800℃
耐热温度最高800℃
热活化型胶粘剂（通过高温直贴激活）
benefits_en: Automatically identify each hot slab/billet with visually clear identification and barcodes
Verify product identity downstream using barcode scanners, cameras or imaging systems
benefits_zh: 自动对每块热板坯/钢坯进行清晰可视的标识和条码识别
下游工序可用条码扫描器、相机或成像系统核验产品身份
records.temperature_performance: Application temperature from 450℃ to 800℃; heat resistance up to 800℃

records.name_en: HP-120S HEATPROOF Label for Heat Treatment Process Management
records.name_zh: HP-120S HEATPROOF 热处理过程管理标签
records.adhesive_en: Pressure-sensitive adhesive (category-level statement on Labels for Heat Treatment page)
records.adhesive_zh: 压敏胶（“热处理用标签”品类页的整体说明）
records.application_en: Heat treatment process management: applied from room temperature (apply-cold-then-heat) and tracked through reheat processes up to 220℃. Case study: identification of injection casting molds through 200〜400℃ multi-cycle heating (used alongside HP-150N/HP-350N). Industries: steel, aluminum, ceramic, automotive, electronics, casting/jig and asset management.
records.application_zh: 热处理过程管理标签：室温贴附（冷贴后加热），可在最高220℃的再加热工序中跟踪产品。应用案例：注射铸造模具在200〜400℃多次循环加热中的标识管理（与HP-150N/HP-350N配合使用）。行业：钢铁、铝业、陶瓷、汽车、电子、铸造/治具及资产管理。
features_en: Application temperature from room temp to 220℃
Excellent ink stability and resistance to smudging at higher application temperatures
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：室温至220℃
最高耐热温度220℃
耐化学性
初粘力强
较高贴附温度下油墨稳定性优异、抗晕染
benefits_en: Scan barcodes into and out of reheat furnaces; printed information and barcodes remain intact through the reheat process
Labels can be die-cut to any size and printed on site
benefits_zh: 进出再加热炉均可扫描条码；打印信息和条码在再加热过程中保持完好
标签可模切成任意尺寸并现场打印
records.temperature_performance: Application temperature from room temp to 220℃; maximum heat resistance to 220℃

records.application_en: Heat treatment process management (apply-cold-then-heat) up to 1200℃; after the baking process the label becomes integrated with the substrate surface. Case studies: management of ceramic products (alumina, glass, carbon) and laboratory crucibles at 1,000℃ for several to a dozen hours (used alongside HP-CBR HB). features_en: After baking process, label becomes integrated with substrate surface
Good durability against scratching, pickling, impact, and multiple heat cycles

records.name_en: HP-CBR HB HEATPROOF Label for Heat Treatment Process Management

records.adhesive_en: Pressure-sensitive adhesive (category-level statement on Labels for Heat Treatment page)
records.adhesive_zh: 压敏胶（“热处理用标签”品类页的整体说明）
records.application_en: Heat treatment process management (apply-cold-then-heat) up to 1200℃, including annealing in non-oxygen atmospheres; after the baking process the label becomes integrated with the substrate surface. Case studies: management of ceramic products (alumina, glass, carbon) and laboratory crucibles at 1,000℃ (used alongside HP-CBR CX2). Industries: ceramic, steel, aluminum, electronics, casting/jig and asset management.
records.application_zh: 热处理过程管理标签（冷贴后加热），最高耐热1200℃，包括无氧气氛退火工艺；经烧成工序后标签与基材表面融为一体。应用案例：陶瓷产品（氧化铝、玻璃、碳）及实验室坩埚在1,000℃下的管理（与HP-CBR CX2配合使用）。行业：陶瓷、钢铁、铝业、电子、铸造/治具及资产管理。
features_en: Good scanability after annealing in non-Oxygen atmosphere
After baking process, label becomes integrated with substrate surface
Good durability against scratching, pickling, impact, and multiple heat cycles
features_zh: 最高耐热温度1200℃
无氧气氛退火后仍具良好可扫描性
柔韧性高
经烧成工序后标签与基材表面融为一体
对刮擦、酸洗、冲击及多次热循环具有良好耐久性
benefits_en: Barcodes remain scannable even after annealing in non-oxygen atmospheres
Identification survives multiple heat cycles, avoiding the need to re-identify products
benefits_zh: 即使在无氧气氛退火后条码仍可扫描
标识可经受多次热循环，无需重新标识产品

records.name_en: HP-L90 HEATPROOF Tag for Heat Treatment Process Management

records.application_en: Process management tag for heat treatment up to 1200℃; can be stud welded, spot welded, or nailed (nail gun application) to steel products, including attachment to HOT products at temperatures from room temperature up to 800℃ (apply-to-hot possible). features_en: Print and cut in thermal transfer printer
Can be attached at temperatures from room temperature to 800℃ (hot attachment)
No adhesive; stud welded, spot welded, or nailed (nail gun application)

可在热转印打印机中打印并切割
可在室温至800℃温度范围内安装（可热装）
无胶；可螺柱焊、点焊或射钉（钉枪）固定
benefits_en: Survives repeated heat cycles avoiding the need to re-identify products; remarking is not necessary

benefits_zh: 可经受反复热循环，无需重新标识产品，无需重新打标

records.temperature_performance: Maximum heat resistance up to 1200℃; attachment from room temperature to 800℃; case study: 1100℃ x 18 hours heat treatment

features_zh: 通过独创制造工艺在胶面形成微通道，具备排气功能
符合UL969标准，可用于电气产品铭板
离型纸：双面聚乙烯淋膜道林纸（象牙色）
benefits_en: Easy to apply and enables perfect bubble-free label application
Air-release mechanism for volatile gases in plastics such as ABS and PC prevents air-bubble formation beneath the label
benefits_zh: 易于贴附，可实现完全无气泡的标签贴合
针对ABS、PC等塑料释放的挥发气体具有排气机制，防止标签下产生气泡

records.name_en: Lock-tight labelstock ML806B
records.name_zh: 自锁式（Lock-tight）标签材料 ML806B
records.facestock_en: Polypropylene (PP) film (white), matt-type polypropylene film suitable for printing
records.facestock_zh: 聚丙烯（PP）薄膜（白色），适合印刷的亚光型聚丙烯薄膜
records.adhesive_en: Special adhesive (adhesive has no tack; bonds when adhesive surfaces are attached together)
records.adhesive_zh: 特殊胶粘剂（胶面本身无粘性，胶面对贴后即牢固粘接）
records.application_en: Price tag-labels for items such as glasses, rings, necklaces and other precious products; suitcase or bag tag-labels; wristbands and other ID tags
records.application_zh: 眼镜、戒指、项链等贵重商品的价格吊牌标签；行李箱或提包吊牌标签；腕带及其他识别（ID）吊牌
features_en: Attaching adhesive surfaces together increases their bonding strength
Adhesive itself has no tack and can be used without sticking to the products
Suitability for printing and converting is the same as that of an ordinary labelstock
features_zh: 胶面对贴可提高粘接强度
胶粘剂本身无粘性，使用时不会粘到商品上
印刷和加工适性与普通标签材料相同
离型膜：聚丙烯（PP）薄膜（透明）
benefits_en: Ideal for display cards and price tags without sticking to merchandise
benefits_zh: 不粘商品，是展示卡和价格吊牌的理想选择

records.name_en: Oil-tolerant labelstock OT8060
records.name_zh: 耐油面标签材料 OT8060
records.application_en: Identification labels for steel, automobile components (such as rust-proofed oily surfaces) and similar applications; general labels for cosmetic- and food-related items
records.application_zh: 钢材、汽车零部件（如防锈油面）等的识别标签；化妆品和食品相关物品的一般标签
features_en: Oil absorption by the adhesive provides good adherence, even to oily surfaces
Printable with conventional ink and/or thermal transfer ribbons
features_zh: 胶粘剂可吸收油分，即使在带油表面也能良好粘附
可使用常规油墨和/或热转印碳带打印
离型纸：蓝色格拉辛纸
benefits_en: Directly applicable to oily surfaces, which improves process efficiency by eliminating surface cleaning processes
benefits_zh: 可直接贴附于带油表面，省去表面清洁工序，提高工艺效率

records.name_en: Cryogenic labelstock CY5040

records.application_en: Medical identification labels for ampules, vials or other containers kept at extremely low temperature

benefits_zh: 在超低温保存的样本上仍可实现可靠标识

records.name_en: Removable labelstock (high adhesion type) RE5014
records.name_zh: 可移除标签材料（高粘型）RE5014
records.facestock_zh: 镀铝聚酯薄膜（银色高光）50µm
records.application_en: Cosmetics, household goods, consumer electronics and other POP/eye-catching labels, and many display labels
records.application_zh: 化妆品、家居用品、家电等的POP/促销吸睛标签及各类展示标签
features_en: High-adhesion, removable labelstock providing reliable adhesion to plastic and other containers, while peeling-off cleanly on demand and leaving little adhesive behind
Uses a highly versatile adhesive compatible with various surfaces, including glass, polyester and polypropylene
features_zh: 高粘可移除型标签材料，对塑料等容器粘附可靠，需要时可干净剥离且几乎不残胶
采用通用性强的胶粘剂，适用于玻璃、聚酯、聚丙烯等多种表面
离型纸：蓝色格拉辛纸
benefits_en: Higher adhesion strength than ordinary removable adhesives, leaving no concern for failure during use
Assists in reuse and recycling of containers and other items
benefits_zh: 粘接强度高于普通可移除胶粘剂，使用中无脱落之忧
有助于容器等物品的再利用和回收

records.name_en: Removable labelstock (low adhesion type) RE503S
records.name_zh: 可移除标签材料（低粘型）RE503S
records.adhesive_zh: 低粘型有机硅（硅胶）胶粘剂
records.application_en: Restaurant/convenience store commercial window posters, showcase POP/eye-catching labels, consumer electronic POP/eye-catching labels, and decoration labels
records.application_zh: 餐厅/便利店商用橱窗海报、展示柜POP/吸睛标签、家电POP/吸睛标签及装饰标签
features_en: Minimizes residual air when label is applied and allows simple application on relatively large-surface labels
Possesses high wetting ability between smooth surface and adhesive; suitable surfaces are glass, acrylic and polycarbonate
Extra smooth release paper used to increase smoothness of adhesive surface, providing superior design properties (clear type)
Product design with excellent dimensional stability provides good flatness for sheet applications and also suits offset printing
features_zh: 贴附时残留空气极少，较大面积标签也能轻松贴附
胶粘剂与光滑表面之间润湿性高；适用表面为玻璃、亚克力和聚碳酸酯
采用超平滑离型纸提升胶面平滑度，具有出色的外观设计效果（透明型）
尺寸稳定性优异，单张应用平整度好，同时适合胶印
离型纸：白色道林纸
benefits_en: Allows simple application and clean removal of even comparatively large-area labels
benefits_zh: 即使较大面积的标签也能轻松贴附并干净移除

records.application_en: Display labels for mayonnaise and other soft squeeze bottles; display labels for shampoo and other semi-squeeze bottles
records.application_zh: 蛋黄酱等软质挤压瓶的展示标签；洗发水等半挤压瓶的展示标签
features_en: Flexible labelstock with excellent follow-up ability to curved surfaces
Allows auto-application by labelling machines, UV printing, and other operations providing a broad range of label uses
Use of identical material for label as the container components which can be directly recycled without peeling process
features_zh: 柔性标签材料，对曲面具有优异的贴合追随性

材质标识：>PE<
benefits_en: Promotes recycling and reuse of molded plastic items without label removal
benefits_zh: 无需去除标签即可促进塑料成型品的回收与再利用
